overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character leading a horse by lantern light through a dark prairie landscape at night. The character departs from a railroad track area and walks along a dirt path through open grassland under a starry sky with visible moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad adjacent path under tree canopy

events.description: character moves from under dense tree cover into more open path alongside railroad
character and horse transition from walking near tracks to open trail heading into prairie

agents.ego_description: cowboy character leading a horse by reins, holding a lantern that illuminates the ground ahead

notable_agents.action: horse being led by the character, walking calmly alongside on the dirt path

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks running parallel to the dirt path on the right side
massive oak tree with spreading branches providing partial canopy cover over the path
unpaved trail winding through the grassland, illuminated by the character's lantern
telegraph pole with crossbars standing beside the railroad tracks

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at night alongside railroad tracks, where a cowboy leads a horse under the partial cover of a large oak tree. The character walks forward on a dirt path, lantern casting a warm glow on the ground, with wooden utility poles visible to the left. The camera follows from behind as they move away from the tracks and begin transitioning into more open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling prairie grassland with scattered oak trees

events.description: lantern light becomes less dominant as bright moonlight illuminates the open landscape
terrain opens up to reveal distant hills and wider sky with stars visible

agents.ego_description: continuing to lead the horse along the winding dirt path through open grassland, moving away from the railroad

notable_agents.action: horse trotting alongside the character, tail swaying as they walk

entered.detail: gentle slopes visible on the horizon under moonlight, creating a layered backdrop
isolated trees dotting the prairie landscape, casting long shadows in the moonlight
bright full moon visible in the night sky providing ambient illumination across the prairie

segments.scene_description: Having left the railroad behind, the character and horse now traverse wide-open rolling prairie under a starry night sky. The moon becomes visible, casting a silvery light across the grassland as scattered oak trees dot the landscape. The path winds through the terrain, with distant hills forming a dark horizon line ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open moonlit prairie with distant tree line

events.description: path curves slightly as character approaches distant landmarks on the horizon
moon rises higher in the sky, casting longer shadows across the tall grass

agents.ego_description: leading the horse through the expansive grassland, lantern swinging gently at his side

notable_agents.action: horse walking steadily, occasionally shaking its head and swishing its tail

entered.detail: dark silhouette of trees marking the horizon ahead, indicating the edge of the prairie
tall prairie grass flanking the dirt path, swaying gently in the night breeze

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character and horse traversing the expansive open prairie under bright moonlight. The terrain is flat and covered in tall grass, with a distant tree line visible on the horizon. The moon has risen higher in the sky, illuminating the path ahead as they continue their steady journey through the quiet wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered edge of a railroad track into the vast, moonlit expanse of an open prairie. It begins beside a large oak tree where a cowboy leads a horse along a dirt path, with a lantern casting a warm glow against the darkness and wooden utility poles lining the way. As the character moves away from the tracks, the environment opens into rolling grasslands under a starry sky, where the moon emerges to cast a silvery light across scattered trees and distant hills. The scene then expands further into a flat, expansive wilderness of tall grass as the moon rises higher in the sky. Finally, the camera continues its steady pursuit of the pair as they journey toward a distant tree line on the horizon under the bright nocturnal light.
